summary: Iteration 62: Verified two NEW features - OCR Validation and Auto-tuning Market Blend Ratio. All 31 pytest tests passed (100%). OCR validation correctly catches: missing names, UI elements as names (Less/More/vs), zero/negative lines, impossibly high lines (>500), unknown prop types. Valid extractions pass for both soccer and basketball. Auto-tune market blend returns valid weight in 0.35-0.80 range, cache works correctly, _blend_with_market_line accepts dynamic weight parameter, and apply_elite_calibration includes marketBlendWeight and blendSamples in calibrationApplied metadata. Health endpoint returns ok. Frontend loads without console errors.
seed_data_creation: None - used unit tests with synthetic data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 62 verified two new features: (1) OCR Validation in scan.py (_validate_extraction function, lines 787-833) catches bad OCR extractions before GPT-4o fallback, (2) Auto-tuning Market Blend in calibration.py (_compute_dynamic_market_weight, lines 535-592) dynamically computes optimal market/model blend weight from historical settled picks. Key constants: MIN_BLEND_SAMPLES=20 (minimum picks for auto-tune), DEFAULT_MARKET_WEIGHT=0.65 (fallback), grid search range 0.30-0.85, safety clamp 0.35-0.80. Currently returns default 65/35 because only 15 soccer / 11 basketball settled picks exist (needs 20+). The calibrationApplied metadata now includes marketBlendWeight and blendSamples fields.

catches: UNKNOWN_PROP_TYPE - prop not in valid set
